landing.title: Smart Financial Management
landing.subtitle: Control your expenses with the power of Google Gemini AI.
landing.description: Say goodbye to boring spreadsheets. Just type what you bought and our AI organizes, categorizes and analyzes your spending automatically.
landing.auth_error: Could not connect to the server. Please check if the backend is running.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Gemini categorizes your expenses automatically from simple descriptions or bank statements.
landing.feature_security_desc: Your data is private and protected by Google's infrastructure.

dashboard.ai_hint: Type what you bought. Gemini will do the rest.
dashboard.upload_success: Statement processed successfully! AI categorized your expenses.
dashboard.upload_error: A server error occurred while processing the statement

ai_assistant.title: AI Financial Consultant
ai_assistant.placeholder: Ex: Where can I save more?
ai_assistant.welcome: Ask me where you can save, or which category you're spending the most!
ai_assistant.error: Sorry, an error occurred while communicating with the AI. Please try again.
